add_params.name: tenantFilter
add_params.description: Tenant selector object {value, label, type, addedFields}. 'AllTenants' is a valid value.

add_params.name: taskType
add_params.description: {'scheduled'|'triggered'}. Determines which scheduling branch is active.

add_params.name: ScheduledTime
add_params.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) for scheduled start. Required when taskType=scheduled.

add_params.name: Recurrence
add_params.description: Recurrence option {label, value} e.g. {label:'Every 1 day', value:'1d'}

add_params.name: parameters
add_params.description: Key-value map of command parameters. String[] types are sent as arrays.

add_params.name: RawJsonParameters
add_params.description: JSON string of parameters when advancedParameters mode is active. Used instead of 'parameters' field.

add_params.name: postExecution
add_params.description: Array of post-execution action objects [{label, value}], e.g. Webhook, Email, PSA

add_params.name: RowKey
add_params.description: Existing task RowKey when editing/re-running. PS1 uses this for RunNow scenario.

add_params.name: RunNow
add_params.description: If true, immediately re-runs the task identified by RowKey

add_params.name: DesiredStartTime
add_params.description: Optional desired start time override passed to Add-CIPPScheduledTask

add_params.name: DisallowDuplicateName
add_params.description: Prevent creating duplicate task names. Also readable from query string.

add_params.name: Trigger
add_params.description: Trigger configuration for triggered tasks. Contains Type, DeltaResource, EventType, ResourceFilter, WatchedAttributes, UseConditions, DeltaConditions, ExecutePerResource, ExecutionMode.

notes: CippSchedulerForm does NOT use CippFormPage's customDataformatter — it calls ApiPostCall directly in handleSubmit() with the raw form values (after extracting String[] param values). The form removes empty/null fields before posting. The Trigger sub-fields are set as top-level form fields with dot-notation keys ('Trigger.Type', 'Trigger.DeltaResource', etc.) which React Hook Form nests into a 'Trigger' object on submission. PS1 passes the entire Body to Add-CIPPScheduledTask.
x_cipp_warnings: This endpoint does not use CippFormPage's customDataformatter — CippSchedulerForm calls ApiPostCall directly. The raw form values (with empty fields stripped) are posted as-is.
